input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.6.1
            TITLE: when seated in the normal driving position, sufficient heat insulation must be provided to

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.6.1: When seated in the normal driving position, sufficient heat insulation must be provided to
T.1.6.1 When seated in the normal driving position, sufficient heat insulation must be provided to 
ensure that the driver will not contact any metal or other materials which may become heated 
to a surface temperature above 60°C.

final_answer: When seated in the normal driving position, sufficient heat insulation must be provided to ensure that the driver will not contact any metal or other materials which may become heated to a surface temperature above 60°C.
